data.name: 인간형 로봇의 견고한 보행을 위한 계층적 차수 축소 모델 예측 제어
모델 예측 제어(MPC)
Unitree Dex3-1 민첩한 손
MIT 휴머노이드 로봇: 곡예 동작을 위한 설계, 운동 계획 및 제어
From Experts to a Generalist: Toward General Whole-Body Control for Humanoid Robots
BeyondMimic: From Motion Tracking to Versatile Humanoid Control via Guided Diffusion
뱅크오브아메리카 인스티튜트 — 휴이노이드 로봇 101
인간-로봇 인체공학적 하중 리프팅을 위한 휴머노이드 로봇 설계 최적화
Unitree G1 휴머노이드 로봇
DemoHLM: From One Demonstration to Generalizable Humanoid Loco-Manipulation
제트 동력 휴머노이드 로봇을 위한 통합 다중 속도 모델 예측 제어
산업용 로봇 안전 요구사항의 진화: ISO 10218-1/2(2011 대 2025) 비교 분석 및 ISO/TS 15066 통합
Geometry-Aware Predictive Safety Filters on Humanoids
로봇이 로봇을 훈련시킨다: 휴머노이드를 위한 자동 실제 세계 정책 적응 및 학습
유닛리 로보틱스
능동 공간 뇌와 일반화 가능한 동작 소뇌를 통한 휴머노이드 전신 조작
관절 토크 센서 및 힘/토크 센서를 활용한 다리 로봇 접촉 감지
From Language to Locomotion: Retargeting-free Humanoid Control via Motion Latent Guidance
로보틱스와 희토류 병목
휴머노이드를 위한 기하-aware 예측 안전 필터: 푸아송 안전 함수에서 CBF 제약 MPC로

data.description: Geometry-Aware Predictive Safety Filters on Humanoids: From Poisson Safety Functions to CBF Constrained MPC cites or references Contact Sensing via Joint Torque Sensors and a Force/Torque Sensor for Legged Robots.

Geometry-Aware Predictive Safety Filters on Humanoids: From Poisson Safety Functions to CBF Constrained MPC cites or references Evolution of Safety Requirements in Industrial Robotics: Comparative Analysis of ISO 10218-1/2 (2011 vs. 2025) and Integration of ISO/TS 15066.

Geometry-Aware Predictive Safety Filters on Humanoids: From Poisson Safety Functions to CBF Constrained MPC cites or references From Experts to a Generalist: Toward General Whole-Body Control for Humanoid Robots.
Geometry-Aware Predictive Safety Filters on Humanoids: From Poisson Safety Functions to CBF Constrained MPC evaluates or benchmarks Unitree G1 Humanoid Robot.

The MIT Humanoid Robot: Design, Motion Planning, and Control For Acrobatic Behaviors cites or references Geometry-Aware Predictive Safety Filters on Humanoids: From Poisson Safety Functions to CBF Constrained MPC.

Geometry-Aware Predictive Safety Filters on Humanoids: From Poisson Safety Functions to CBF Constrained MPC cites or references From Language to Locomotion: Retargeting-free Humanoid Control via Motion Latent Guidance.

Geometry-Aware Predictive Safety Filters on Humanoids: From Poisson Safety Functions to CBF Constrained MPC cites or references DemoHLM: From One Demonstration to Generalizable Humanoid Loco-Manipulation.

Robot Trains Robot: Automatic Real-World Policy Adaptation and Learning for Humanoids cites or references Geometry-Aware Predictive Safety Filters on Humanoids: From Poisson Safety Functions to CBF Constrained MPC.

Humanoid Whole-Body Manipulation via Active Spatial Brain and Generalizable Action Cerebellum cites or references Geometry-Aware Predictive Safety Filters on Humanoids: From Poisson Safety Functions to CBF Constrained MPC.
Geometry-Aware Predictive Safety Filters on Humanoids: From Poisson Safety Functions to CBF Constrained MPC uses or builds on Unitree Dex3-1 Dexterous Hand.
Bank of America Institute — Humanoid Robots 101 cites or references Geometry-Aware Predictive Safety Filters on Humanoids: From Poisson Safety Functions to CBF Constrained MPC.
Robotics and The Rare Earth Bottleneck cites or references Geometry-Aware Predictive Safety Filters on Humanoids: From Poisson Safety Functions to CBF Constrained MPC.

Geometry-Aware Predictive Safety Filters on Humanoids: From Poisson Safety Functions to CBF Constrained MPC cites or references BeyondMimic: From Motion Tracking to Versatile Humanoid Control via Guided Diffusion.
Geometry-Aware Predictive Safety Filters on Humanoids: From Poisson Safety Functions to CBF Constrained MPC mentions Model Predictive Control (MPC).

Hierarchical Reduced-Order Model Predictive Control for Robust Locomotion on Humanoid Robots cites or references Geometry-Aware Predictive Safety Filters on Humanoids: From Poisson Safety Functions to CBF Constrained MPC.

Optimization of Humanoid Robot Designs for Human-Robot Ergonomic Payload Lifting cites or references Geometry-Aware Predictive Safety Filters on Humanoids: From Poisson Safety Functions to CBF Constrained MPC.

Evolution of Safety Requirements in Industrial Robotics: Comparative Analysis of ISO 10218-1/2 (2011 vs. 2025) and Integration of ISO/TS 15066 cites or references Geometry-Aware Predictive Safety Filters on Humanoids: From Poisson Safety Functions to CBF Constrained MPC.

Unified Multi-Rate Model Predictive Control for a Jet-Powered Humanoid Robot cites or references Geometry-Aware Predictive Safety Filters on Humanoids: From Poisson Safety Functions to CBF Constrained MPC.
논문은 실험에 사용된 Go2 사족 로봇과 G1 휴머노이드 플랫폼의 제조사로서 Unitree를 모델명으로 식별한다.
Geometry-Aware Predictive Safety Filters on Humanoids cites Geometry-Aware Predictive Safety Filters on Humanoids: From Poisson Safety Functions to CBF Constrained MPC.
